questions.question: Who photographed and filmed the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival?
questions.answer: First Sight Films photographed and filmed the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival at Fort Mose Historic State Park for two years running, covering every night of performances.

questions.question: What is the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival?
questions.answer: First Sight Films has been the photo and video partner for the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival, an annual celebration of African American history and music at Fort Mose Historic State Park in St. Augustine — the first legally sanctioned free Black settlement in what is now the United States, established in 1738.

questions.question: Which artists did First Sight Films photograph at the festival?
questions.answer: First Sight Films photographed Gary Clark Jr, Samara Joy, Ledisi, Robert Cray, and Ruthie Foster performing at the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival, along with the crowds and cultural programming.

questions.question: Does First Sight Films cover multi-night music festivals?
questions.answer: First Sight Films covers multi-night music festivals end to end, filming and photographing every night — as it has for two years at the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival in St. Augustine.

questions.question: Does First Sight Films shoot both photo and video at festivals?
questions.answer: First Sight Films shoots both photography and video at festivals with one coordinated team, delivering performance photos, crowd candids, highlight reels, and short-form social clips.

questions.question: What does First Sight Films deliver for a festival?
questions.answer: First Sight Films delivers a highlight reel, short-form social clips, and festival photography, plus optional artist interviews and promotional content for the next year's event.

questions.question: Does First Sight Films work with nonprofits and cultural organizations?
questions.answer: First Sight Films works with nonprofit and cultural organizations like St. Johns Cultural Events, producing festival photo and video for the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival at Fort Mose Historic State Park.
